day0.subject: Thanks for reaching out about your {{project_type}}

day1.subject: Recent {{project_type}} installs you might like
day1.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Sharing a few recent installs similar to what you described: {{portfolio_url}}. We specialize in clean, modern surfaces with premium finishes.

If you want a fast estimate, reply with:
- Rough dimensions or photos
- Preferred material
- Target budget range

Or book a 15‑minute design call: {{calendar_url}}

day3.subject: Quartz vs granite vs quartzite — quick breakdown
day3.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Here’s a fast guide:
- Quartz: low maintenance, consistent patterns
- Granite: natural variation, durable
- Quartzite: premium look, high-end feel

If you want tailored recommendations, send any inspo photos or color preferences.

day6.subject: Case study: {{project_type}} transformation in Cincinnati

day10.subject: Want us to hold a measurement slot for you?
day10.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Just checking in—happy to reserve a measurement slot and send a design‑ready estimate. If now isn’t the right time, no worries—just let me know your timeline.

day14.subject: Quick check-in + seasonal availability
day14.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

If you’re still exploring options, we can provide a fast estimate and material recommendations. We also have availability for {{timeline}} projects if you want to move soon.

Reply with any updates and we’ll take it from there.

sms.day0: Hi {{first_name}}—thanks for reaching out to Urbanstone. Quick Q: which material are you considering + your timeline? If easier, book a quick call: {{calendar_url}}
sms.day3: Need help choosing? Quartz = low maintenance, granite = natural variation, quartzite = premium. Want a quick rec? Reply with a photo or style you like.
sms.day10: Still interested in a countertop estimate? I can hold a measurement slot this week if you want.
